# Renewal Proposal — Constitution · Foundational Standards

**Layer:** Constitution · Foundational Standards
**Owner:** Revenue
**Status:** Draft
**Last reviewed:** 2026-05-13
**Arabic mirror:** [renewal_proposal_AR.md](./renewal_proposal_AR.md)

## Context
This is the canonical renewal proposal template, used to convert
proof at the end of a Sprint or Pilot into a retainer or expansion.
It is sent within seven days of the handoff. It builds on
`docs/CUSTOMER_SUCCESS_PLAYBOOK.md` for the customer success motion,
`docs/COMPANY_SERVICE_LADDER.md` for the ladder, and
`docs/delivery/HANDOFF_PROCESS.md` for the handoff package it follows.
Every claim it makes must trace to evidence in the proof pack.

## Cover
- Client name: `<text>`
- Current engagement: `<text>` (`<SOW-id>`)
- Proposed engagement: `<text>` (`<New-SOW-id-draft>`)
- Author (Revenue): `<text>`
- Date: `<date>`

## Section 1 — KPI Evidence
Restate the hero metric from the proof pack and tie it to the
audit/proof events.

| Metric | Baseline | Achieved | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `<text>` | `<text>` | `<text>` | `<AUD-id / PEV-id>` |

## Section 2 — Proposed Cadence
Recommended monthly cadence and capacity.

- Engagement type: `<Retainer | Sprint | Pilot>`
- Cadence: `<weekly / biweekly / monthly>` working sessions
- Capacity per month: `<text>` hours / drafts / capabilities advanced
- Reporting cadence: `<text>`

## Section 3 — Package Selection
Recommend a package from `docs/COMPANY_SERVICE_LADDER.md` and explain
why this is the right next step from the capability score.

- Recommended package: `<text>`
- Current capability level: `<0-5>` → target: `<0-5>`
- Expected business outcome: `<text>`
- Why this beats alternatives: `<text>`

## Section 4 — Price
- Monthly fee: `<currency amount>`
- Minimum term: `<text>`
- Discount tier (if any): `<text>`
- Payment schedule: `<text>`
- Out-of-scope hourly rate: `<currency amount>`
- VAT and ZATCA per `docs/INVOICING_ZATCA_READINESS.md`.

## Section 5 — Risks And Assumptions
List the assumptions behind the proposal and the risks that could
break them, with mitigations.

- Assumption: `<text>` — risk: `<text>` — mitigation: `<text>`
- Assumption: `<text>` — risk: `<text>` — mitigation: `<text>`

## Section 6 — Next-Step CTA
One named action, owner, and date.

- Action: `<text>`
- Owner: `<text>`
- Due: `<date>`
- Decision options: `Accept | Modify | Decline`.

## Section 7 — Authorization
- Client sponsor: `<name, title, date>`
- Dealix revenue lead: `<name, date>`
- Dealix founder (countersign): `<name, date>`

## Interfaces
| Inputs | Outputs | Owners | Cadence |
|---|---|---|---|
| Proof pack | Renewal proposal | Revenue | Within 7 days of handoff |
| Service ladder | Package selection | Revenue | Per proposal |
| Pricing rules | Final price | Founder | Per proposal |
| Signed proposal | New SOW intake | Delivery lead | Per acceptance |

## Metrics
- **Send-within-7-days rate** — Target: 100%.
- **Acceptance rate** — Target: ≥ 50%.
- **Decision latency** — days from send to decision. Target: ≤ 14.
- **Expansion ratio** — share of renewals that include an upsell.
  Target: ≥ 40%.
